curation_notes: Patch modifies a single line in p2p/discover/net.go in the checkTopicRegister function. The fix casts data.Idx (type uint) to int before comparing < 0, since comparing a uint < 0 is always false and allows a wrapped negative index to bypass bounds validation. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow (CWE-190) is correct — the vulnerability is an unsigned-to-signed integer wraparound. No sibling files share this pattern.
